features: 【PACKING LIST】This silk hair clip is large in size, ensuring comfortable all-day wear whether you wear it half-tied, fully tied or loose. It comes in 3 versatile colors (pink/black/khaki) to match any outfit or occasion

【HIGH-QUALITY MATERIALS】Made from high-quality acrylic and mesh, this large cloud hair clip features a strong spring to hold even the thickest hair firmly in place. The ultra-smooth surface prevents hair from getting damaged or snagged
【COMFORTABLE TO WEAR】This soft chiffon pleated hair clip creates instant volume and a towering crown shape, saying goodbye to flat hair. It is lightweight and comfortable to wear all day long

【MULTI-FUNCTION】The silk hair claw clip is very suitable for washing your face, applying makeup or fixing your neck hair. It can be used to clip your hair away from your face when exercising or working, keeping your hair neat

【WIDE APPLICATION】The classic pleated design combines practicality with elegance, and these clips will add a stylish touch to a messy bun, ponytail or casual updo, from office meetings to weekend trips
